title: Got questions? Good.
intro: Got questions? We've got answers. Here are the most common questions from students before they transform their careers with web design.

items.question: I'm a complete beginner. Is this for me?
items.answer: 100%. This course starts from zero — no design background needed. Most of our successful students started with zero experience.

items.question: How is this different from free YouTube content?
items.answer: YouTube is great for tips, but this is a full roadmap: structured modules, assignments, live Q&A, portfolio guidance, and interview prep—so you finish hireable, not just informed.

items.question: What if I get stuck or need help?
items.answer: You’ll have live Q&A sessions, community support, and clear milestones so you’re never guessing what to do next.

items.question: Do I need to know Figma first?
items.answer: No. We build Figma skills step by step inside the course—from basics through advanced UI and prototyping.

items.question: How long do I have access?
items.answer: One-time payment · Lifetime Course Access to the materials included with your enrollment.
